microsoft_ft: **Embedded end-to-end** with Azure's most strategic enterprise customers — Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp — to identify high-leverage resilience gaps, ship solutions in weeks, and convert field discoveries into platform capabilities adopted org-wide.

Scaled a **0→1 Resilience Automation Platform** from prototype to production, defining full-lifecycle requirements — data modeling, self-service scheduling, and deployment — that reduced operational toil by 30% and handled 45+ annual drills at scale.

Owned ambiguous, high-stakes outcomes end-to-end: pioneered Azure's first rack-level proactive resilience drill program, shipping in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate and surfacing critical hardware defects that reshaped the continuous validation roadmap.

Bridged product and customer as the sole field lead on a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, translating on-site workflow discovery into system design decisions under executive visibility and zero margin for failure.

Built and shipped an **internal AI agent** for drill planning that restructured execution workflows, cut planning cycle time by 39%, and increased drill capacity by 21% — a one-off solution that became a core platform capability across the resilience org.

Designed systems for **10x usage** by standardizing recovery validation workflows across 140+ cross-org stakeholders, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized, self-service model driving $14M+ in measurable business impact.

Deployed, monitored, and debugged resilience executions across distributed Azure infrastructure — directing 14 high-visibility cross-org recovery runs and ensuring **full-stack reliability** from infra configuration through post-drill reporting and stakeholder readout.
microsoft_2023: **Forward-deployed** AI-driven code generation tooling directly with 14 Azure service teams — conducting on-site demos, rapid iteration sessions, and workflow integration that drove sustained adoption and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly across the customer base.

Converted one-off customer field findings into roadmap features by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, identifying critical intent-based YAML generation gaps and directly influencing the product backlog to address real workflow blockers.

Shipped a full **semantic search migration** for internal documentation — implementing metadata standards, validating retrieval accuracy with real users, and cutting lookup time by 83%, turning a prototype into a production tool teams depended on daily.
microsoft_2022: **Embedded with 20+ service teams** across a 140+ team org to discover 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, translating field findings into a scalable automation roadmap that generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut launch timelines by 28%.

Owned the full discovery-to-delivery lifecycle for a cross-functional automation prioritization framework — defining ambiguous requirements, securing alignment across 140+ teams, and shipping a unified system that became the operational standard for region launches.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to monitor operational toil in real time across 140+ teams, giving leadership a production-grade tool to identify automation gaps, sequence high-impact investments, and validate that shipped solutions were driving measurable outcomes.
amazon_robotics: **Shipped a zero-downtime OS migration** across a 2,000+ unit pilot deployment by owning full-lifecycle system design — mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, defining rollback strategies, and embedding with Operations to validate solutions against real production workflows.

Owned end-to-end deployment reliability by partnering with IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, cutting software deployment cycle time by 25% and eliminating the manual handoffs that were blocking team throughput.

Drove outcome ownership across ambiguous, cross-functional priorities — facilitating Agile ceremonies, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets**, and stabilizing the developer intake process so engineering teams could ship without re-escalating blockers each sprint.
pro_painters: **Embedded directly with sales and operations** to redesign the end-to-end proposal and invoicing lifecycle — building a new CRM workflow that processed 200+ monthly proposals and increased job bookings by 26% by removing friction from the customer conversion path.

Owned a **full-stack go-to-market deployment** — auditing the existing digital presence, optimizing the website and Google Business profile, and executing a data-driven campaign strategy that cut Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and lifted conversions by 2.7%.

Validated pricing strategy with real data by conducting financial analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and delivering actionable profitability models that gave leadership a scalable framework for scoping and bidding future work.

skills_priority: Full-Stack Engineering: React, Django, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, SQL, Python
Cloud Infrastructure & Deployment: AWS, Azure, GCP, CI/CD, distributed systems
Forward-Deployed Engineering: on-site customer embedding, rapid prototyping, end-to-end delivery
System Design & Architecture: data modeling, scalability, performance, reliability engineering
AI & Automation: AI agents, LLM-powered tools, semantic search, workflow automation, RAG, prompt engineering
Product & Roadmap: discovery, requirements, roadmapping, field-to-platform feature conversion
Monitoring & Observability: deployment, debugging, production reliability, Power BI
Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Databases, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning
tailoring_notes: 'Embed & ship' framing from JD woven into microsoft_ft bullet 1 ('embedded end-to-end with strategic enterprise customers') and amazon_robotics bullet 1 ('embedded with Operations to validate solutions').

'Convert one-off solutions into platform capabilities' — explicit JD phrase used verbatim in microsoft_ft bullet 1 and paraphrased in microsoft_2023 bullet 2 ('converting field findings into roadmap features').

'Full lifecycle: discovery, system design, data modeling, infra, deployment, monitoring' — mirrored structurally in microsoft_2022 bullet 2 ('full discovery-to-delivery lifecycle') and amazon_robotics bullet 1 ('full-lifecycle system design — mapping dependencies, defining rollback strategies').
'Design systems that handle 10x usage' — surfaced directly in microsoft_ft bullet 6 ('designed systems for 10x usage by standardizing workflows across 140+ stakeholders').

'Prototype to production in days/weeks' — echoed in microsoft_ft bullet 2 ('prototype to production') and microsoft_2023 bullet 3 ('turning a prototype into a production tool teams depended on daily').

'Own outcomes / high-ownership' — foregrounded in microsoft_ft bullet 3 ('owned ambiguous, high-stakes outcomes end-to-end') and amazon_robotics bullet 3 ('drove outcome ownership across ambiguous, cross-functional priorities').
